violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking proper handwashing signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Inspector observed sugar stored in a bin without lid. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Lowboy located in the service area was not in good repair (holding temp at 47 degrees F). Fridge not in use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -toaster, -oven, -cold drawer, -ice maker vents, -cabinet in back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Unused items and equipment were observed stored in the refuse area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The floors throughout the facility, especially in-between the ovens, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Containers of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

The: 1.floors throughout front counter area. 2.walls near handwashing sink. 3.coffee machine area 4.under beverage stations 5.rolling racks 6.shelves under all front end equipment 7.floors under all front end equipment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
